overview: Ghoul is a Normal-class Undead monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 110 HP, 19 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 3 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Rush Scratch at 180% ratio (342 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 170.

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 2 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Rush Scratch (180%), Jump Scratch (140%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Paralysis
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Paralysis icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Paralysis UI Data
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Paralysis UI Data icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison Damage
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison Damage icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison UI Data
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison UI Data icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1500 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 170, ability check distance 220
strategies.description: Combat area radius 170. Ability check distance 220.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1500 units.
